description: Versioned catalog of known-safe (sanitizer) functions per framework and CWE. Community-maintainable.

CWE-78.notes: Use shell=False with argument lists instead of shell=True with strings.

CWE-79.notes: Auto-escaping in Jinja2/Django templates also neutralises XSS.

CWE-89.notes: Parameterized queries (?, %s, :name) are the primary defense.

CWE-22.notes: After resolving, assert the path starts with the safe base directory.

CWE-95.notes: Never pass user input to eval/exec. Use safe parsing alternatives.

CWE-502.notes: JSON is safe; pickle, yaml.load, marshal are not safe with untrusted data.

CWE-918.notes: Allowlist validated hostnames; block private/internal IP ranges.

CWE-601.notes: Internal redirects via url_for/reverse are safe; external must be allowlisted.

CWE-79.notes: React JSX auto-escapes text; avoid dangerouslySetInnerHTML with user data.

CWE-89.notes: Always use parameterized queries or ORM query builders.

CWE-78.notes: Use execFile/spawn with argument arrays instead of exec with shell strings.

CWE-22.notes: After path.resolve, verify the result starts with the expected base directory.

CWE-918.notes: Parse URLs and allowlist the hostname before making outbound requests.

CWE-601.notes: Accept only relative paths or origins from a strict allowlist.
